claim_text: We present a simple approach to determine $t$ from DFT results
receipt_sentence: We present a simple approach to determine $t$ from DFT results that relies on measuring hybridization, projecting hybridized pair orbitals onto constituent frontier orbitals of the interacting molecules, using spatially discretized wavefunctions (``cube files'') rather than analytical representations.

claim_text: The recall is clearly higher for S-Graphs
receipt_sentence: Fig. REF  presents the precision/recall of the room detection in S-Graphs+ (the method described in Section REF ) and the one in S-Graphs. Note how the precision is slightly higher for S-Graphs+. More importantly, the recall is clearly higher for S-Graphs, in particular for scenarios with complex layouts such as C2F1.
